Field.name: icon_id
Field.Description: The icon to use for this item.\nTypically found in menu\tex\icon.

Field.name: speffect_id
Field.Description: The SpEffect script to use for this item.

Field.name: sfx_on_use_1
Field.Description: A SFX that occurs on use.

Field.name: sfx_on_use_2
Field.Description: A SFX that occurs on use.

Field.name: sfx_on_use_3
Field.Description: A SFX that occurs on use.

Field.name: weapon_id
Field.Description: Which weapon this item is linked to.

Field.name: armor_id
Field.Description: Which armor piece this item is linked to.

Field.name: ammo_id
Field.Description: Which ammunition this item is linked to.

Field.name: ring_id
Field.Description: Which ring this item is linked to.

Field.name: spell_id
Field.Description: Which spell this item is linked to.

Field.name: gesture_id
Field.Description: Which gesture this item is linked to.

Field.name: sort_id
Field.Description: Where the item appears in the inventory view. 0 is the top.

Field.name: base_price
Field.Description: Price to purchase the item from a vendor.\nPer-merchant pricing can be altered with ShopLineupParam.

Field.name: sell_price
Field.Description: Souls given when sold to Gavlan.

Field.name: animation_speed
Field.Description: For usable items or weapons, the speed at which the item is used.

Field.name: item_type_id
Field.Description: Item Type parameters to use.

Field.name: item_usage_id
Field.Description: Item Usage parameters to use.

Field.name: max_held_count
Field.Description: Maximum number that can be held at any one time.

Field.name: speffect_context
Field.Description: The context in which the SpEffect is applied.

Field.name: item_sp_effect_type
Field.Description: Relates to SpEffect, 1 is instant effects, 2 is 'persistent' effects.
